steps.title: Read the flower counts from the bar graph
steps.content: From the bar graph: Orchid = 180, Lily = 100, Tulip = 140, Sunflower = 160, and Daisy = 120 (total = 700).

steps.title: Test each pair for a sum of 280
steps.content:
Orchid + Lily = 180 + 100 = 280 ✓
Tulip + Lily = 140 + 100 = 240
Orchid + Sunflower = 180 + 160 = 340
Tulip + Daisy = 140 + 120 = 260
Only Orchid + Lily equals the target. That matches choice A — A is correct.
